name: procure-ai-mcp
description: Procure AI MCP server — find suppliers/contracts/products in Bitrix24 CRM and create procurement deals, plus feedback. Local stdio bundle. / MCP-сервер Procure AI — поиск поставщиков/договоров/товаров в Bitrix24 CRM и создание сделок закупки, плюс обратная связь. Локальный stdio-бандл. / Servidor MCP do Procure AI — buscar fornecedores/contratos/produtos no CRM do Bitrix24 e criar negócios de compra, mais feedback. Pacote stdio local.
long_description:
Gives AI assistants direct access to a Bitrix24 portal via an incoming webhook for the procurement workflow: find a supplier by UNP, find an active contract and a catalog product, and create a procurement deal (funnel «Закупки») — plus a meta-tool to file structured feedback as a GitHub issue. Runs entirely on your machine — no server to operate, no public URL, no Bearer token. The webhook secret stays in Claude Desktop's encrypted user_config storage and never leaves the device.

Works with Bitrix24 Cloud (any TLD — .com / .ru / .by / …) and Bitrix24 Self-Hosted (on-premise). For self-hosted portals on a private CA, set NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS in your shell before launching Claude Desktop.

Localised install guides:
• Русский: mcp-stdio/INSTALL.ru.md
• Português (BR): mcp-stdio/INSTALL.pt-BR.md

Project status: https://github.com/postroyka/purchase-ai-chat

webhook_url.title: Bitrix24 webhook URL · URL вебхука Bitrix24 · URL do webhook Bitrix24
webhook_url.description:
EN: Full incoming-webhook URL. Bitrix24 Cloud: https://<portal>.bitrix24.<tld>/rest/<user_id>/<secret>/ (any TLD — .com / .ru / .com.br / .es / .de / …). Bitrix24 Self-Hosted: any internal domain, same URL shape. Create one under Developer resources → Other → Inbound webhook. The secret stays on your device.

RU: Полный URL входящего вебхука. Bitrix24 Cloud: https://<портал>.bitrix24.<tld>/rest/<user_id>/<secret>/ (любая зона — .ru / .com / .by / …). Self-Hosted: любой внутренний домен с такой же структурой. Создаётся в портале: «Разработчикам → Другое → Входящий вебхук». Секрет хранится у вас на устройстве.

PT-BR: URL completa do webhook de entrada. Bitrix24 Cloud: https://<portal>.bitrix24.<tld>/rest/<user_id>/<secret>/ (qualquer TLD — .com.br / .com / .es / …). Self-Hosted: qualquer domínio interno com a mesma estrutura. Crie em «Recursos para desenvolvedores → Outros → Webhook de entrada». O segredo fica no seu dispositivo.

github_feedback_token.title: GitHub feedback token (optional) · Токен GitHub для обратной связи · Token de feedback no GitHub
github_feedback_token.description:
EN: Fine-grained PAT with Issues: read/write on postroyka/purchase-ai-chat. Enables bx24mcp_submit_feedback so the assistant can file structured issues when something is unclear. Leave empty to disable.

RU: Fine-grained PAT с правом Issues: read/write на postroyka/purchase-ai-chat. Включает инструмент bx24mcp_submit_feedback — ассистент сможет создавать структурированные issue при неясностях. Оставьте пустым, чтобы отключить.

PT-BR: Fine-grained PAT com Issues: read/write em postroyka/purchase-ai-chat. Habilita o bx24mcp_submit_feedback para o assistente abrir issues estruturadas quando algo não estiver claro. Deixe em branco para desativar.

github_feedback_repo.title: Feedback repository · Репозиторий для feedback · Repositório de feedback
github_feedback_repo.description: EN/RU/PT-BR: owner/repo for the feedback tool. Defaults to the project repository.

log_level.title: Log level · Уровень логирования · Nível de log
log_level.description: Common values: error · warn · info · debug (default: info); also accepts notice · critical · alert · emergency. Logs go to stderr (Claude Desktop's extension log panel), never stdout. RU: Обычно error · warn · info · debug (по умолчанию info); также notice · critical · alert · emergency; логи в stderr. PT-BR: Comuns: error · warn · info · debug (padrão info); também notice · critical · alert · emergency; logs em stderr.
